message:
feat(db,storage): fixture-driven tracking tests, notification signals, compilation fixes

- Fix extract_table() to return Option<String> and handle schema-qualified names
- Add global QueryTracker singleton with record_query() for TrackedConnection
- Fix TrackedConnection::close() for borrowed inner reference
- Fix LIKE fallback to pass &tracked instead of &*conn
- Add 2 fixture-driven tests covering 40 vectors (27 table extraction + 13 aggregation)
- Add 9 notification signal tests in storage crate
- Resolve all clippy warnings (elided lifetime, must_use, cast_precision_loss)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
